---
title: "E-Commerce Website Development"
description: "Built a full stack online shopping platform using front end and back end technologies."
author: "Esha Esha"
date: "2026-04-18"
image: ../../images/ecommerce.jpg
categories: [Technology, Web Development, Digital]
---

# Project Overview

This project involved building a responsive e-commerce platform focused on user experience, functionality, and online sales growth.

## Main Features

- Product catalogue  
- User login system  
- Shopping cart  
- Checkout process  
- Mobile responsive design  
- Smooth navigation  

## Technologies Used

- HTML  
- CSS  
- JavaScript  
- PHP  
- MySQL  

## Python Visualisation

```{python}
#| echo: false

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

pages = ["Home", "Products", "Cart", "Checkout"]
visits = [500, 420, 260, 180]

plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))
plt.pie(visits, labels=pages, autopct="%1.1f%%", startangle=90)
plt.title("Website User Traffic Flow")
plt.show()
```

## Learning Outcome

This project strengthened my web development skills and demonstrated how design quality can improve digital sales performance.
